description: Project workflow session creation, delayed start, immutable workflow selection, allowed overrides, and configuration/effective-definition snapshots.

userStories.title: Document session override and pre-start edit policies
userStories.description: As an implementation lead, I need override scope decisions before session APIs are built so that configuration behavior is explicit.
acceptanceCriteria: Document prompt override eligibility rules for workflow/session nodes
Document whether model, thinking level, and fast mode apply workflow-wide or per eligible Agent node
Document whether allowed session-scoped fields remain editable between configured-session creation and first start
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add configured workflow Project session record fields
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I need Project sessions to record selected workflow metadata so that configured sessions exist before runs start.
acceptanceCriteria: Project workflow session records store Project id, Pibo Session id, session name, workflow id, workflow version, and configured/not-started state
Session states include configured, running, waiting, completed, failed, and cancelled
Session creation does not create a workflow run record
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement workflow session creation API
userStories.description: As a Pibo user, I need an API-backed creation flow so that I can choose a published workflow version and configure allowed session values.
acceptanceCriteria: Creation API accepts session name, workflow id/version, input values, prompt overrides, model, thinking level, and fast mode using documented override eligibility and scope rules
Creation API rejects unpublished, archived-by-default, missing, or invalid workflow versions
Creation API rejects agent profile overrides, retry limit overrides, handler/adapter/guard overrides, and arbitrary options
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Persist configuration and effective-definition snapshot
userStories.description: As a runtime developer, I need immutable snapshots so that runs remain inspectable after workflow edits, archive, or delete.
acceptanceCriteria: Snapshot stores snapshot id, Project id, Pibo Session id, workflow id, workflow version, base definition hash, and effective definition hash
Snapshot stores input values plus prompt overrides keyed by node id when present
Snapshot stores model, thinking level, fast mode, and creation timestamp when present
Snapshot persistence records whether model, thinking level, fast mode, and prompt overrides apply workflow-wide or per eligible Agent node
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement explicit start API with one-run enforcement
userStories.description: As a Pibo user, I need Start to create exactly one run so that session lifecycle is predictable.
acceptanceCriteria: Start API validates the session snapshot immediately before run creation
Start API creates exactly one workflow run for the Project session
Second-start attempts are rejected or idempotently return the existing run without creating another run
One-run enforcement does not disable allowed parallel node execution inside the run
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Enforce immutable workflow selection after session creation
userStories.description: As a collaborator, I need selected workflow identity to remain stable so that historical behavior is explainable.
acceptanceCriteria: Update paths cannot change workflow id or workflow version after session creation
Pre-run edit policy is documented, and update paths enforce that policy for allowed session-scoped fields before start
Session-scoped configuration never persists back to the workflow definition
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Build configured-session Project UI state
userStories.description: As a Pibo user, I need to see a configured workflow session before running it so that I can review and start safely.
acceptanceCriteria: Configured session view shows selected workflow id/version and configuration summary
Configured session view shows validation state, explicit Start action, and empty run-history state
Blocked create or start actions show diagnostics linked to invalid input, override, schema, or missing reference
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add Project session snapshot lifecycle tests
userStories.description: As a QA engineer, I need tests for session creation, start, immutability, and deleted-definition inspection.
acceptanceCriteria: Tests cover configured-session creation without workflow run creation
Tests cover one-run enforcement and workflow id/version immutability
Tests verify historical run views use snapshot data after live workflow definition changes or is deleted
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Added snapshot lifecycle regression coverage: configured session creation has no run, start is idempotent/immutable, and deleted UI workflow historical run inspection returns the saved snapshot/effective definition.
